meta.title: DEF CON 33 - Ask EFF -  Cooper Quintin, Lisa Femia, Thorin Klosowski, Alexis Hancock, Hannah Zhao
meta.description: Electronic Frontier Foundation (EFF) is excited to be back at DEF CON. Our expert panelists will offer brief updates on EFF's work defending your digital rights, before opening the floor for attendees to ask their questions. This dynamic conversation centers challenges DEF CON attendees actually face, and is an opportunity to connect on common causes.
